motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def checkPalindromeFormation(self, a: str, b: str) -> bool:
    a_length = len(a)
    b_length = len(b)
    if a_length != b_length:
        return False
    for i in range(a_length // 2):
        if a[i] != b[i]:
            return False
    return True

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
